Our Promotional Activities Continue Unabated

15.10.2024

With the opening of schools, our promotional activities for high schools continue with all intensity.

Within the scope of Ibn Haldun University promotional activities, we continue to host high school students from all over Istanbul in our Complex. We also visit high schools all around Turkey and tell them about our University.

In our new semester promotional activities that started as of September 2024, more than 500 prospective students from 10 successful high schools have visited our University so far. In addition, promotional activities were carried out by visiting more than 40 high schools in Adana, Konya, Ordu, Samsun, Denizli and Aydın in this one-month period.

Introducing Our University with Its Privileged Facilities

During the high school visits, students are given detailed information about our educational opportunities, scholarships, dormitories and the rich social-cultural privileges and activities at our Complex.

In the activities where our students share their experiences about YKS preparations and preferences with prospective high school students by giving “How I Succeeded” seminars, candidates also have the opportunity to meet with our academicians about their careers and get to know our departments.

Candidates visit our Complex under the guidance of our students and have an idea about the physical education and training facilities, social facilities and international student environment.

Within the scope of promotional activities, our activities for high school candidates will continue until June 2025.
